test_enet_float_precision
Automatic alpha grid generation is not supported for l1_ratio=0. Please supply a grid by providing your estimator with the appropriate `alphas=` argument.)
Coordinate descent without L1 regularization may lead to unexpected results and is discouraged. Set l1_ratio > 0 to add L1 regularization.r3
